mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT name FROM tb_userinfo WHERE loginID = cour.professor) as prof_name ,cour.course_id as course_id ,tb_user.name as stu_name ,tb_user.loginID as stu_loginID ,cour.title as cour_title , (SELECT att_sta_code FROM course_attendance WHERE course_id = cour.course_id AND loginID = tb_user.loginID AND DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() LIMIT 1) as today_att_code , (SELECT attendance_code FROM course_attendance WHERE course_id = cour.course_id AND loginID = tb_user.loginID AND DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m-%d') = CURDATE() LIMIT 1) as today_att_code_pk ,COUNT(CASE WHEN cour_att.att_sta_code = 1 THEN 1 END) AS att_cnt ,COUNT(CASE WHEN cour_att.att_sta_code = 2 THEN 1 END) AS att_per_cnt ,COUNT(CASE WHEN cour_att.att_sta_code = 3 THEN 1 END) AS att_leav_cnt ,COUNT(CASE WHEN cour_att.att_sta_code = 4 THEN 1 END) AS att_out_cnt ,COUNT(CASE WHEN cour_att.att_sta_code = 0 THEN 1 END) AS att_abs_cnt ,stu_cour.stu_cou_sta_code as stu_cou_sta_code FROM course cour INNER JOIN student_course stu_cour ON cour.course_id = stu_cour.course_id INNER JOIN tb_userinfo tb_user ON stu_cour.loginID = tb_user.loginID LEFT JOIN course_attendance cour_att ON (cour.course_id = cour_att.course_id AND tb_user.loginID = cour_att.loginID) WHERE cour.course_id = #{course_id} AND stu_cour.stu_cou_sta_code IN (0, 2) GROUP BY cour.course_id, tb_user.name, cour.title, stu_loginID, stu_cour.stu_cou_sta_code ORDER BY stu_cour.stu_cou_sta_code ASC, tb_user.name ASC

SELECT count(total.course_id) as stu_att_cnt FROM ( SELECT stu_cour.course_id ,tb_user.name ,stu_cour.loginID FROM student_course stu_cour left join course cour on stu_cour.course_id = cour.course_id left join tb_userinfo tb_user on stu_cour.loginID = tb_user.loginID left join course_attendance cour_att on stu_cour.loginID = cour_att.loginID WHERE stu_cour.course_id = #{course_id} and stu_cour.stu_cou_sta_code = 0 GROUP BY stu_cour.course_id ,tb_user.name ,stu_cour.loginID ,cour.professor ) as total

SELECT (SELECT name FROM tb_userinfo WHERE loginID = cour.professor) as prof_nm , stu_cour.loginID as loginID , cour.course_id as course_id , tb_user.name as stu_nm , cour.title as cour_title , DATE_FORMAT(cour_att.date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as att_date , cour_att.att_sta_code as att_sta_code , cour_att.attendance_code as att_code FROM student_course stu_cour /* 1. 수강생 정보를 먼저 가져온다 (출석 여부와 상관없이) */ INNER JOIN tb_userinfo tb_user ON tb_user.loginID = stu_cour.loginID INNER JOIN course cour ON cour.course_id = stu_cour.course_id /* 2. 출석 기록은 '있으면' 가져온다 (없으면 NULL) */ LEFT JOIN course_attendance cour_att ON (cour_att.loginID = stu_cour.loginID AND cour_att.course_id = stu_cour.course_id) WHERE stu_cour.loginID = #{stu_loginID} AND stu_cour.course_id = #{course_id} AND stu_cour.stu_cou_sta_code = 0 ORDER BY att_date LIMIT #{pageIndex}, #{pageSize}

SELECT (SELECT name FROM tb_userinfo WHERE loginID = cour.professor) as prof_name , cour.course_id as course_id , tb_user.name as stu_name , tb_user.loginID as stu_loginID , cour.title as cour_title , att.att_sta_code as att_sta_code , att.attendance_code as today_att_code , stu_cour.stu_cou_sta_code as stu_cou_sta_code , att.attendance_code as today_att_code , #{att_date} as att_date FROM course cour INNER JOIN student_course stu_cour ON cour.course_id = stu_cour.course_id INNER JOIN tb_userinfo tb_user ON stu_cour.loginID = tb_user.loginID LEFT JOIN course_attendance att ON ( att.loginID = tb_user.loginID AND att.course_id = cour.course_id AND DATE_FORMAT(att.date, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{att_date} ) WHERE cour.course_id = #{course_id} AND stu_cour.stu_cou_sta_code IN (0, 2) GROUP BY cour.course_id, tb_user.name, cour.title, stu_loginID, stu_cour.stu_cou_sta_code, att.att_sta_code, att.attendance_code ORDER BY stu_cour.stu_cou_sta_code ASC, tb_user.name ASC
